name: two-ceilings
description: Two Ceilings — bailout & minimum-gas planner monorepo. A shared, pure ZH-L16C+GF decompression engine feeds two sibling apps (GF Visualizer + Gas Planner) and a pure gas model.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/deco-engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/gas-model/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/gf-visualizer/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/gas-planner/tsconfig.json
